search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted to lastzwiki.com as requested. Prioritized concrete wiki/guide pages over home pages and excluded generic or off-topic pages.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster page with faction filters, hero levels, and equipment sections; useful for hero discovery and cross-checking character list.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero names, factions, and basic hero/equipment reference

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page with category tabs, costs per level, and a searchable list of laboratory upgrades; useful for research discovery and cost cross-checking.
results.primary_user_job: Look up research categories and badge costs by level

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Early-game guide covering starter heroes, resource flow, and progression basics; useful as a broad context page for hero progression research.
results.primary_user_job: Get early-game progression context for heroes and research

search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost

search_records.no_results_reason: No results found in the allowed domain for the provided query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to lastz.fandom.com as requested. Results were limited to pages that directly support discovery for heroes, research, and events. No claim should be treated as player-facing proof from a single page.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event page that includes an Age of Science phase for technology research and a Hero Initiative phase for hero upgrades.
results.primary_user_job: Find event tasks tied to research and hero growth.
claims_to_verify: Cycle order and timing by day
Point rules for research and hero actions

results.title: Event Center | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events, useful for finding where research-linked events are organized.
results.primary_user_job: Navigate to event pages and rules.

results.title: Laboratory | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core building page for technology research, relevant to research-related event tasks and cross-checking unlocks.
results.primary_user_job: Verify where research actions happen and when they unlock.
claims_to_verify: HQ unlock level for the Lab

search_records.search_notes: Searched the approved domain only. No matching pages were found for the exact query within the allowed Packsify domain. Could try a broader packsify.com search or an explicit URL crawl if available.
search_records.no_results_reason: No results from www.packsify.com matched the query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to mmediamreza.com only. Returned a mix of relevant Last Z guides and one weekly event lead; generic homepage and unrelated pages were excluded.

results.title: Military Center Guide: Maximize Unit Cap & Base Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Base building guide for Military Center. Covers unit cap growth, HQ unlock, refugee assignment, and base power impact.
results.primary_user_job: Check military capacity and power growth details.

results.title: Rider Camp Guide: Train & Promote Rider Units - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Upgrade table for Rider Camp with costs, cap, speed, and power by level.
results.primary_user_job: Compare rider camp stats and upgrade costs.

results.title: Weekly Lucky Number - Research Speed Bonu (May 18 - May 24) - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Weekly event post describing a lucky-number gift action and a temporary research speed bonus.
results.primary_user_job: Track current weekly bonus conditions and duration.
